output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?formerName WHERE {
  ?match wdt:P349 wd:Q5291288 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1545 ?result ; wdt:P1098 14415 ; wdt:P1261 ?venue .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 1974)
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?result) , "2-0"))
  ?venue wdt:P1388 ?formerName .
}
output.formatted:
Maine Road

  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?result) , "2-0"))

}
